nasb.text: And the sea gave up the dead which were in it, and death and Hades gave up the dead which were in them; and they were judged, every one of them according to their deeds.

esv.text: And the sea gave up the dead who were in it, Death and Hades gave up the dead who were in them, and they were judged, each one of them, according to what they had done.

cnv.text: 於是海把其中的死人交出來，死亡和陰間也把其中的死人交出來，他們都照著各人所行的受審判。

ccb.text: 海洋、死亡和阴间都交出了它们里面的死人，使他们按着各人的行为受审判。

csbs.text: 于是，海洋交出了其中的死人，死亡和阴间也交出了其中的死人；每个人都照着自己的行为受审判。
